title: Add universal ai_process tool that handles any text processing via AI instruction
goal: 범용 AI 텍스트 처리 tool을 추가한다. text + instruction을 받아 AI가 instruction에 따라 처리 결과를 반환한다. 요약, 번역, 분석, 정리, 필터링 등 별도 tool 없이 하나로 다 처리한다. 기존 summarize tool은 ai_process의 wrapper로 대체한다.

test_requirements.case: ai_process without API key returns extractive fallback
test_requirements.expected: success=True with truncated input as fallback
summarize tool internally calls ai_process logic

constraints: Params: {text: string (required), instruction: string (required), language?: string (optional)}
Return: {success: true, data: {result: string, instruction: string}}
If no API key: return first 500 chars of text with note 'AI processing unavailable'
Truncate input text to 10000 chars before sending to AI
System prompt: 'Process the given text according to the instruction. Return only the processed result.'
Refactor summarize tool to be a thin wrapper that calls ai_process with instruction='Summarize this text concisely'
Do not remove summarize from registry — keep both registered (ai_process for AI plans, summarize for backward compat)
Do not modify ai/agent.py or ai/summarizer.py
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
